description: Vena main window. Network policy (§11.2): the WEBVIEW may only reach the IPC bridge and Google Fonts (CSP); ALL outbound HTTP happens in the Rust core, code-gated to user-initiated store/catalog downloads (Gutendex, Standard Ebooks, user OPDS, AO3), Hugging Face model downloads, and the user's own BYO endpoint. No telemetry. Reading data never leaves the device.
